radical_translation.name: Ground
radical_translation.mnemonic: This is the ground. Look at it, just a flat line that stretches from one side to the other. That is the ground.

radical_translation.name: Chao
radical_translation.mnemonic: Isto e o chao. Olhe para ele, apenas uma linha plana que se estende de um lado ao outro. Isso e o chao.

radical_translation.name: Barb
radical_translation.mnemonic: This radical is shaped like a barb. Kind of like the barb you'd see on a barbed fishing hook. Imagine that thing getting stuck in your arm.

radical_translation.name: Farpa
radical_translation.mnemonic: Este radical tem a forma de uma farpa. Como a farpa que voce veria em um anzol de pesca. Imagine isso preso no seu braco.

radical_translation.name: Toe
radical_translation.mnemonic: This radical looks like a toe. A big toe, specifically. Imagine wiggling your big toe around.

radical_translation.name: Dedo do pe
radical_translation.mnemonic: Este radical parece um dedo do pe. Um dedao, especificamente. Imagine mexendo seu dedao.

radical_translation.name: Tree
radical_translation.mnemonic: This radical looks like a tree. You can see the trunk going up with branches spreading out and roots going down.

radical_translation.name: Arvore
radical_translation.mnemonic: Este radical parece uma arvore. Voce pode ver o tronco subindo com galhos se espalhando e raizes descendo.

radical_translation.name: Mouth
radical_translation.mnemonic: This radical looks like a mouth, wide open. It's a square shape, like a mouth opened as wide as possible to scream.

radical_translation.name: Boca
radical_translation.mnemonic: Este radical parece uma boca, bem aberta. E uma forma quadrada, como uma boca aberta o maximo possivel para gritar.

radical_translation.name: Big
radical_translation.mnemonic: This radical looks just like a stick figure—more specifically, a really big guy with his arms stretched out nice and big. When you see this radical, just think big, because this guy is really BIG!

radical_translation.name: Grande
radical_translation.mnemonic: Este radical parece um boneco palito—um cara bem grande de bracos abertos. Quando vir este radical, pense em grande, porque este cara e realmente GRANDE!

radical_translation.name: Lid
radical_translation.mnemonic: This looks like something you'd put on a kettle or a pot, right? It even has a little handle to make sure you don't burn yourself. This is some kind of lid.

radical_translation.name: Tampa
radical_translation.mnemonic: Parece algo que voce colocaria numa chaleira ou panela. Tem ate uma alcinha para nao se queimar. E uma especie de tampa.

radical_translation.name: Person
radical_translation.mnemonic: This is a person. They're standing with their arms down at their sides and their legs spread out, which kind of makes them look like a torso with a pair of legs. Think of 人 as highlighting the bipedal nature of people. Walking on two legs? Probably a person.

radical_translation.name: Pessoa
radical_translation.mnemonic: Esta e uma pessoa. De pe com os bracos ao lado e as pernas afastadas, como um torso com pernas. 人 destaca a natureza bipedia das pessoas. Andando em duas pernas? Provavelmente uma pessoa.

radical_translation.name: Enter
radical_translation.mnemonic: Watch out! This isn't the person radical, it's something else. What's the difference? The right side is longer than the left. This radical also has that extra part sticking out at the top. See it? It kind of looks like a person lowering their head to go inside a tent or something. That's why this radical is enter.

radical_translation.name: Entrar
radical_translation.mnemonic: Atencao! Nao e o radical de pessoa. O lado direito e mais longo que o esquerdo, e ha uma parte extra no topo. Parece alguem baixando a cabeca para entrar numa tenda. Por isso este radical e entrar.

radical_translation.name: Power
radical_translation.mnemonic: Imagine a guy flexing his arm downward to show off his steroid-pumped arm. It's huge. It's so full of power. RARRRWWWRRR!!

radical_translation.name: Forca
radical_translation.mnemonic: Imagine um cara flexionando o braco para baixo mostrando o musculo. E enorme. Cheio de forca. RARRRWWWRRR!!

radical_translation.name: Dog
radical_translation.mnemonic: The dog radical and dog kanji are exactly the same!

radical_translation.name: Cachorro
radical_translation.mnemonic: O radical cachorro e o kanji cachorro sao exatamente iguais!

kanji_translation.meaning_mnemonic: You find a toe on the ground. It's weird, because it's above the ground, not where toes belong.
kanji_translation.reading_mnemonic: When you find a toe above the ground, you want to know where it came from. This toe belongs to Joe (じょう).

kanji_translation.meaning_mnemonic: Voce encontra um dedo do pe no chao. E estranho, porque esta acima do chao, nao onde dedos do pe pertencem.
kanji_translation.reading_mnemonic: Quando voce encontra um dedo do pe acima do chao, quer saber de onde veio. Este dedo pertence ao Joe (じょう).

kanji_translation.meaning_mnemonic: This kanji is one line. One single, simple line. What else could the meaning be? One.
kanji_translation.reading_mnemonic: When you lay this one flat line on the ground, it becomes itchy (いち). The ground makes everything itchy.

kanji_translation.meaning_mnemonic: Este kanji e uma linha. Uma unica linha simples. O que mais poderia significar? Um.
kanji_translation.reading_mnemonic: Quando voce coloca esta unica linha no chao, fica com coceira (いち). O chao deixa tudo com coceira.

kanji_translation.meaning_mnemonic: This kanji contains a barb. When you have the talent to pull a barb out of someone, you are truly gifted.
kanji_translation.reading_mnemonic: A talented person says 'sai' (さい) when they perform their skills.

kanji_translation.meaning_mnemonic: Este kanji contem uma farpa. Quando voce tem o talento de tirar uma farpa de alguem, voce e realmente talentoso.
kanji_translation.reading_mnemonic: Uma pessoa talentosa diz 'sai' (さい) quando demonstra suas habilidades.

kanji_translation.meaning_mnemonic: Two trees together make a grove or forest. When you see two trees side by side, you know you're entering a forest.
kanji_translation.reading_mnemonic: In the forest, you can hear a ring (りん) of a bell echoing through the trees.

kanji_translation.meaning_mnemonic: Duas arvores juntas formam um bosque ou floresta. Quando voce ve duas arvores lado a lado, sabe que esta entrando numa floresta.
kanji_translation.reading_mnemonic: Na floresta, voce pode ouvir um toque (りん) de um sino ecoando entre as arvores.

kanji_translation.meaning_mnemonic: The big radical and the big kanji are exactly the same!
kanji_translation.reading_mnemonic: There's this big guy (that's how you remember the radical, remember?), and he's wearing a huge Tie Dye (たい, だい) shirt. Because he's so huge, the tie dye shirt is also super huge. Everything about him is pretty big, but the tie dye stands out more than anything.

kanji_translation.meaning_mnemonic: O radical grande e o kanji grande sao exatamente iguais!
kanji_translation.reading_mnemonic: Aquele cara grande esta usando uma camisa tie dye (たい, だい) enorme. Como ele e enorme, a camisa tambem e. Tudo nele e grande, mas o tie dye se destaca.

kanji_translation.meaning_mnemonic: This is a person. They're standing with their arms down at their sides and their legs spread out.
kanji_translation.reading_mnemonic: A person is one (ひと) who walks on two legs.

kanji_translation.meaning_mnemonic: Esta e uma pessoa. De pe com os bracos ao lado e as pernas afastadas.
kanji_translation.reading_mnemonic: Uma pessoa e aquele que anda em duas pernas.

kanji_translation.meaning_mnemonic: The dog radical and dog kanji are exactly the same!
kanji_translation.reading_mnemonic: Every dog likes to eat noodles (いぬ). Like that movie where the dogs share a noodle and end up kissing, right? So when you see 犬, just imagine how those two eat noodles.

kanji_translation.meaning_mnemonic: O radical cachorro e o kanji cachorro sao exatamente iguais!
kanji_translation.reading_mnemonic: Todo cachorro gosta de comer macarrao (いぬ). Como no filme onde os cachorros compartilham um macarrao. Quando vir 犬, imagine esses dois comendo macarrao.

vocabulary_translation.meaning_explanation: When a vocab word is a single kanji and alone, it tends to steal the meaning from the kanji. It means above or up.
vocabulary_translation.reading_explanation: When a vocab is a single kanji and all alone, it usually uses the kun'yomi. Above you is a huge weight (うえ).

context_sentences.ja: 山の上でヨガをしたいね。
context_sentences.pt: Quero fazer yoga no topo da montanha.

context_sentences.ja: 上のフロアにキッチンがあります。
context_sentences.pt: Ha uma cozinha no andar de cima.

context_sentences.ja: リビングルームの上にロフトがあります。
context_sentences.pt: Ha um loft acima da sala de estar.

vocabulary_translation.meaning_explanation: Quando uma palavra de vocabulario e um unico kanji sozinho, ela tende a pegar o significado do kanji. Significa acima ou em cima.
vocabulary_translation.reading_explanation: Quando um vocabulario e um unico kanji sozinho, geralmente usa a kun'yomi. Acima de voce ha um peso enorme (うえ).

context_sentences.ja: 山の上でヨガをしたいね。
context_sentences.pt: Quero fazer yoga no topo da montanha.

context_sentences.ja: 上のフロアにキッチンがあります。
context_sentences.pt: Ha uma cozinha no andar de cima.

context_sentences.ja: リビングルームの上にロフトがあります。
context_sentences.pt: Ha um loft acima da sala de estar.

vocabulary_translation.meaning_explanation: This word combines the kanji for above with the verb ending. It means to lift something up.
vocabulary_translation.reading_explanation: The reading comes from the kun'yomi of the kanji. You lift (あげる) things above your head.

context_sentences.ja: 手を上げてください。
声を上げる。

vocabulary_translation.meaning_explanation: Esta palavra combina o kanji de acima com a terminacao verbal. Significa levantar algo.
vocabulary_translation.reading_explanation: A leitura vem da kun'yomi do kanji. Voce levanta (あげる) coisas acima da sua cabeca.

context_sentences.ja: 手を上げてください。
声を上げる。

vocabulary_translation.meaning_explanation: This is the number one. A single kanji that represents the number one.
vocabulary_translation.reading_explanation: The reading for this one is いち, the on'yomi reading.

context_sentences.ja: 一から始めましょう。

vocabulary_translation.meaning_explanation: Este e o numero um. Um unico kanji que representa o numero um.
vocabulary_translation.reading_explanation: A leitura para este e いち, a leitura on'yomi.

context_sentences.ja: 一から始めましょう。

vocabulary_translation.meaning_explanation: This word combines 'above' with 'hand'. If your hand is above others, you are good at something.
vocabulary_translation.reading_explanation: Both kanji use on'yomi readings here: じょう + ず = じょうず.

context_sentences.ja: 彼女はピアノが上手です。

vocabulary_translation.meaning_explanation: Esta palavra combina 'acima' com 'mao'. Se sua mao esta acima dos outros, voce e bom em algo.
vocabulary_translation.reading_explanation: Ambos os kanji usam leituras on'yomi aqui: じょう + ず = じょうず.

context_sentences.ja: 彼女はピアノが上手です。

vocabulary_translation.meaning_explanation: Big (大) plus person (人) — an adult is a full-grown person.
vocabulary_translation.reading_explanation: This word uses the kun'yomi おお for 大 and とな for 人, together おとな.

context_sentences.ja: 大人になったら、何になりたい？
context_sentences.pt: Quando crescer, o que voce quer ser?

vocabulary_translation.meaning_explanation: Grande (大) mais pessoa (人) — um adulto e uma pessoa crescida.
vocabulary_translation.reading_explanation: Esta palavra usa kun'yomi おお para 大 e とな para 人, juntos おとな.

context_sentences.ja: 大人になったら、何になりたい？
context_sentences.pt: Quando crescer, o que voce quer ser?

vocabulary_translation.meaning_explanation: This vocab made up of a single kanji shares its meaning with said single kanji. That meaning is dog.
vocabulary_translation.reading_explanation: Since this is a word made up of a single kanji and nothing else, you can assume that this word will use the kun'yomi reading. The reading you learned for this kanji happens to be the kun'yomi reading as well. So if you know the kanji you know the reading.

context_sentences.ja: ぼくのペットは犬です。
この犬は、チワワですか？
うちの犬、ライオンくらいの大きさなんです。
context_sentences.pt: My dog is about the size of a lion.

vocabulary_translation.meaning_explanation: Esta palavra de um unico kanji compartilha o significado do kanji. O significado e cachorro.
vocabulary_translation.reading_explanation: Sendo uma palavra de um unico kanji, usa a leitura kun'yomi. A leitura do kanji e いぬ.

context_sentences.ja: ぼくのペットは犬です。
この犬は、チワワですか？
うちの犬、ライオンくらいの大きさなんです。
context_sentences.pt: My dog is about the size of a lion.
